PyCon 2025

Annual Python Conference for Developers, Data Scientists & Enthusiasts

About PyCon 2025

Join the global Python community

PyCon 2025 brings together developers, data scientists, and Python enthusiasts from around the world for an unforgettable experience. Whether you're a beginner or an expert, PyCon offers something for everyone.

Attend inspiring talks from industry leaders, participate in hands-on workshops, network with fellow Pythonistas, and discover the latest trends and innovations in the Python ecosystem.

🎤

Expert Talks

Learn from leading Python developers and industry experts sharing their insights and experiences.

🛠️

Hands-on Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering various Python topics and frameworks.

🤝

Networking

Connect with thousands of Python developers and build meaningful professional relationships.

🌍

Community

Be part of the vibrant global Python community and contribute to open source projects.

Schedule

Key dates and events

May 15-17, 2025

Main Conference

Three days of talks, workshops, and networking sessions featuring the best of the Python community.

May 14, 2025

Tutorials Day

Pre-conference tutorials covering beginner to advanced Python topics and frameworks.

May 18, 2025

Sprints

Post-conference sprints where you can contribute to open source Python projects.

Venue

Where we're gathering

Convention Center

Location: Downtown Convention Center

Address: 123 Main Street, Tech City, TC 12345

Capacity: 5,000+ attendees

Our venue features state-of-the-art facilities including multiple conference halls, workshop spaces, and networking areas. Easy access to public transportation and nearby hotels.

Amenities

  • ✓ Free WiFi throughout the venue
  • ✓ Complimentary breakfast and lunch
  • ✓ Accessible facilities
  • ✓ Parking available
  • ✓ Quiet spaces for breaks
  • ✓ On-site childcare available
